EXPERIENCE
Valentina
Cloudflare 2022-present
Senior Site Reliability Engineer
Karinsky
Led infrastructure modernization initiative serving 200M+ daily requests; migrated 40+
microservices to Kubernetes, reducing deployment time by 67%
Designed and implemented multi-region disaster recovery system with 99.99% uptime
◆ CONTACT SLA; reduced RTO from 4h to 12min across 8 data centers
Mentored team of 5 junior SREs; established runbook automation reducing MTTR by
☎ +44 7911 445823 45% on critical incidents

✉
Infrastructure Engineer
in valentina-karinsky
Architected Terraform state management infrastructure supporting 500+ enterprise
⌥ ValentinaKarinsky clients; implemented consistency checks reducing deployment errors by 89%
⌘ https://valentina.dev Optimized Consul cluster operations across AWS, Azure, GCP; reduced cloud
infrastructure costs by $2.1M annually through auto-scaling policies
◆ EDUCATION Built CI/CD pipeline using Vault for secrets rotation; achieved zero-knowledge secret
distribution across 1200+ nodes
Technical University of Munich (TUM)
Stripe 2018-2020
MSc Computer Science
2017-2019 SRE (Platform Infrastructure)
Thesis on distributed systems Managed Kubernetes platform serving $100B+ annual payment volume; implemented
optimization: reduced latency by 34% in automated capacity planning reducing over-provisioning waste by 38%
horizontally-scaled microservice Designed distributed tracing system using Jaeger; identified and resolved 12 critical
architectures latency bottlenecks in payment processing pipeline
GPA 3.8/4.0; completed specialization in Led on-call rotation covering 24/7 incident response; achieved 99.98% API availability
Cloud Computing and Infrastructure maintaining SLA commitments across all regions
Engineering
Wise (formerly TransferWise) 2017-2018
National University of Sofia Junior DevOps Engineer
BSc Information Technology Automated infrastructure provisioning on AWS using Terraform; reduced manual
2013-2017
deployment steps from 47 to 3, cutting deployment time from 90min to 8min
Graduated top 8% of cohort; focus on
Built monitoring dashboards with Prometheus and Grafana for 30+ microservices;
systems programming and network
implemented alerting reducing mean-time-to-awareness by 52%
infrastructure
Contributed to Kubernetes migration project; containerized legacy payment processing

service, improving release frequency from monthly to weekly
students; designed curriculum for
containerization concepts
PROJECTS
◆ SKILLS CloudShield - Multi-Cloud Security Orchestration 2023
Terraform, Kubernetes, Vault, Python, AWS/GCP
Languages Built automated security compliance framework for 3 cloud providers; reduced security
Go Python Rust Bash SQL audit time from 3 weeks to 2 days through policy-as-code
Technologies Implemented 650+ infrastructure policy checks; caught 87% of misconfigurations before
Kubernetes Terraform Prometheus deployment, preventing 4+ production incidents
Docker AWS GCP Azure Kafka ObserveFlow - Real-time Infrastructure Analytics 2022
gRPC etcd PostgreSQL Elasticsearch Prometheus, ClickHouse, Go, Apache Kafka, React
Vault Consul Jaeger Engineered high-throughput metrics pipeline processing 50M+ data points/minute with
Tools <100ms query latency at 99th percentile
Git GitHub GitLab Jenkins ArgoCD Enabled 120+ engineers across company to debug infrastructure issues 5x faster;
Grafana PagerDuty DataDog reduced incident investigation time from avg 45min to 9min
ELK Stack Jira Confluence RegionSync - Cross-Datacenter State Management 2021
etcd, gRPC, Rust, Docker, PostgreSQL
Designed state consistency layer supporting eventual consistency model across 15
regions; achieved sub-second convergence with 99.97% accuracy
Reduced data replication bandwidth by 72% through intelligent compression; saved
$340K annually in egress costs
AlertXL - Intelligent Incident Correlation Engine 2020
Python, Machine Learning, Elasticsearch, Kafka, FastAPI
Developed ML-based alert deduplication system reducing alert noise by 68%; on-call
engineers reported 46% improvement in mean-time-to-resolution
Processed 2.3M alerts/day with 94% precision in root-cause clustering; prevented alert
fatigue across 80+ person engineering team
EXTRACURRICULAR
Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) 2021-present
Kubernetes Maintainer (Release Team)
Oversee testing and validation for quarterly Kubernetes releases; coordinate quality
assurance across 40+ volunteer contributors worldwide
Published 8 technical RFCs on container orchestration patterns; speaker at KubeCon
EU 2022, 2023 reaching 3,500+ attendees
Infrastructure Engineering Meetup - Berlin 2020-present
Co-organizer & Speaker
Grew meetup from 120 to 890 active members; organized 24 technical talks covering
observability, infrastructure automation, and incident management
Mentored 15 junior engineers transitioning into SRE roles through structured 12-week
program with 92% completion rate
